Region in New South Wales, Australia

**Southern Sydney**, also commonly referred to as the **Southern suburbs**, is the southern metropolitan area of [Greater Sydney](/wiki/Greater_Sydney "Greater Sydney"), in the state of [New South Wales](/wiki/New_South_Wales "New South Wales"), [Australia](/wiki/Australia "Australia").

Southern Sydney is a title for the regions and neighbourhoods which fall directly south and south-west of the [Sydney CBD](/wiki/Sydney_CBD "Sydney CBD") from the southern boundaries of [Central Station](/wiki/Central_Station,_Sydney "Central Station, Sydney") down to the [Airport](/wiki/Kingsford_Smith_Airport "Kingsford Smith Airport") and [St George region](/wiki/St_George,_Sydney "St George, Sydney") around the southern and western shores of [Botany Bay](/wiki/Botany_Bay "Botany Bay") with the southern most concluding point being the [Sutherland Shire](/wiki/Sutherland_Shire "Sutherland Shire"). This includes all the suburbs in the [local government areas](/wiki/Local_government_in_Australia "Local government in Australia") of [Georges River Council](/wiki/Georges_River_Council "Georges River Council"), The [Sutherland Shire](/wiki/Sutherland_Shire "Sutherland Shire"), most of [Bayside Council](/wiki/Bayside_Council "Bayside Council") and the southern suburbs of [City of Sydney](/wiki/City_of_Sydney "City of Sydney").[[1]](#cite_note-1) The [Australian Bureau of Statistics](/wiki/Australian_Bureau_of_Statistics "Australian Bureau of Statistics") defines a statistical area called The St George-Sutherland Statistical Subdivision[[2]](#cite_note-2) and The City and Inner South Statistical Subdivision.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

Because the regions that make up Southern Sydney are mostly separated by Botany Bay and The Georges River, rather than directly bordering each other, occasionally suburbs on the eastern shore of Botany Bay are included within Southern Sydney.

The Southern Sydney councils participate in the Southern Sydney Regional Organisation of Councils (SSROC) along with six other councils in the City, [Eastern Suburbs](/wiki/Eastern_Suburbs_(Sydney) "Eastern Suburbs (Sydney)") and Inner West regions.[[4]](#cite_note-SSROC-4)

The southern suburbs of [Sydney](/wiki/Sydney "Sydney") can be grouped into three regions: the Inner South, St George and the Sutherland Shire.

## Inner South

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Southern_Sydney&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Inner South")]

The Inner Southern Suburbs of [Sydney](/wiki/Sydney "Sydney"), sometimes referred to as 'South Sydney' include the southern suburbs of [City of Sydney](/wiki/City_of_Sydney "City of Sydney") as well as some of [Bayside Council](/wiki/Bayside_Council "Bayside Council"). The area encompasses the suburbs directly south of [Central Station](/wiki/Central_Station,_Sydney "Central Station, Sydney") or more specifically [Cleveland Street](/wiki/Cleveland_Street,_Sydney "Cleveland Street, Sydney") leading all the way down to the [Airport](/wiki/Kingsford-Smith_Airport "Kingsford-Smith Airport") and fall west of the [Eastern Distributor](/wiki/Eastern_Distributor "Eastern Distributor") but east of the [Alexandra Canal](/wiki/Alexandra_Canal_(New_South_Wales) "Alexandra Canal (New South Wales)"). The area starts with [Redfern](/wiki/Redfern,_New_South_Wales "Redfern, New South Wales") then continues down through [Eveleigh](/wiki/Eveleigh,_New_South_Wales "Eveleigh, New South Wales"), [Waterloo](/wiki/Waterloo,_New_South_Wales "Waterloo, New South Wales"), [Zetland](/wiki/Zetland,_New_South_Wales "Zetland, New South Wales"), [Alexandria](/wiki/Alexandria,_New_South_Wales "Alexandria, New South Wales"), [Beaconsfield](/wiki/Beaconsfield,_New_South_Wales "Beaconsfield, New South Wales"), [Rosebery](/wiki/Rosebery,_New_South_Wales "Rosebery, New South Wales"), [Eastlakes](/wiki/Eastlakes,_New_South_Wales "Eastlakes, New South Wales") (West of [Eastern Distributor](/wiki/Eastern_Distributor "Eastern Distributor")) and ends in [Mascot](/wiki/Mascot,_New_South_Wales "Mascot, New South Wales").[[5]](#cite_note-5)

The postcodes start at 2015 and end in 2020 with the suburbs of [Botany](/wiki/Botany,_New_South_Wales "Botany, New South Wales") and [Banksmeadow](/wiki/Banksmeadow,_New_South_Wales "Banksmeadow, New South Wales") being the exception having the postcode of 2019 which while being geographically south of the [CBD](/wiki/Sydney_CBD "Sydney CBD") along with the included suburbs are actually on the other side of the Eastern Distributor usually deeming them [Eastern Suburbs](/wiki/Eastern_Suburbs_(Sydney) "Eastern Suburbs (Sydney)") that are south-east of CBD rather than part of South Sydney.[[6]](#cite_note-6)

The region consists of three train stations being [Redfern](/wiki/Redfern_railway_station "Redfern railway station"), [Green Square](/wiki/Green_Square_railway_station "Green Square railway station") and [Mascot](/wiki/Mascot_railway_station "Mascot railway station") as well as one [Metro](/wiki/Metro_North_West_%26_Bankstown_Line "Metro North West & Bankstown Line") station in [Waterloo](/wiki/Waterloo_railway_station,_Sydney "Waterloo railway station, Sydney").[[7]](#cite_note-7) Green Square is a locality situated at the meeting point of Alexandria, Zetland, Waterloo, and [Beaconsfield](/wiki/Beaconsfield,_New_South_Wales "Beaconsfield, New South Wales"). Green Square and Mascot station are on the [Airport Link](/wiki/Airport_Link,_Sydney "Airport Link, Sydney")[[8]](#cite_note-8) completed in 2000 which is part of the T8 [Airport & South Line](/wiki/Airport_%26_South_Line "Airport & South Line"). Many of these suburbs were predominantly industrial and commercial but have now developed into new residential neighbourhoods of high rise apartments.[[9]](#cite_note-9)

The Inner Southern Suburbs are sometimes considered inner city or included as part of the Eastern Suburbs that are south-east of CBD however strictly speaking these suburbs geographically are neither east nor south-east of the [Sydney CBD](/wiki/Sydney_CBD "Sydney CBD").

## St George

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Southern_Sydney&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: St George")]

The [St George](/wiki/St_George_(Sydney) "St George (Sydney)") area, considered the southern suburbs includes all the suburbs in the [Georges River Council](/wiki/Georges_River_Council "Georges River Council") and the western part of [Bayside Council](/wiki/Bayside_Council "Bayside Council") which was [Rockdale City](/wiki/City_of_Rockdale "City of Rockdale") prior to 2016. This is everything within the boundaries of Salt Pan Creek to the west, The Georges River to the south, Botany Bay to the east and the [M5 Motorway](/wiki/M5_Motorway_(Sydney) "M5 Motorway (Sydney)") and [Wolli Creek](/wiki/Wolli_Creek "Wolli Creek") to the north. This area corresponds to the southern portion of the cadastral [Parish of St George](/wiki/Parish_of_St_George "Parish of St George"),[[10]](#cite_note-10) from which the region derives its name.

The northern portion of the Parish of St George that is north of the M5 and Wolli Creek but south of The Cooks River is considered [South-Western Sydney](/wiki/South-Western_Sydney "South-Western Sydney") rather than Southern Sydney. This northern portion of the cadastral parish was formerly in the City of Canterbury but now within the amalgamated [City of Canterbury-Bankstown](/wiki/City_of_Canterbury-Bankstown "City of Canterbury-Bankstown"). In some instances the whole cadastral Parish of St George (both north and south) is grouped together and considered the [inner south-west](/wiki/South-Western_Sydney "South-Western Sydney") due to its geographical location from [Sydney CBD](/wiki/Sydney_CBD "Sydney CBD").[[11]](#cite_note-11)

## Sutherland Shire

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Southern_Sydney&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Sutherland Shire")]

The [Sutherland Shire](/wiki/Sutherland_Shire "Sutherland Shire") is the area to the south of [Botany Bay](/wiki/Botany_Bay "Botany Bay") and the [Georges River](/wiki/Georges_River "Georges River"). The Sutherland Shire is 26 kilometres (16 mi) south of the [Sydney CBD](/wiki/Sydney_central_business_district "Sydney central business district"), and is bordered by the [City of Canterbury-Bankstown](/wiki/City_of_Canterbury-Bankstown "City of Canterbury-Bankstown"), and [Georges River Council](/wiki/Georges_River_Council "Georges River Council") local government areas.

The administrative centre of the local government is located in the suburb of [Sutherland](/wiki/Sutherland,_New_South_Wales "Sutherland, New South Wales").[[12]](#cite_note-12)

## Suburbs in Southern Sydney

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Southern_Sydney&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Suburbs in Southern Sydney")]

* [Beaconsfield](/wiki/Beaconsfield,_New_South_Wales "Beaconsfield, New South Wales")
* [Eastlakes](/wiki/Eastlakes,_New_South_Wales "Eastlakes, New South Wales") (West of [Eastern Distributor](/wiki/Eastern_Distributor "Eastern Distributor"))
* [Eveleigh](/wiki/Eveleigh,_New_South_Wales "Eveleigh, New South Wales")
* [Mascot](/wiki/Mascot,_New_South_Wales "Mascot, New South Wales")
